prompt: I want to add dark mode to our React app. It needs system preference detection, a manual toggle that persists in localStorage, and all existing components need to support both themes. We use Tailwind CSS. Break this into tasks.

assertions.text: Output contains a task overview or summary table listing all tasks
Every task section includes a Description with narrative context and a Technical decisions block
Acceptance criteria use Given/When/Then scenario format, not checkbox lists
Every task section includes an Out of Scope subsection
No task punts context to 'see the spec' or 'refer to the spec' — all context is inline
Tasks collectively cover system preference detection, manual toggle with persistence, and component theming
Document uses Goal / Task Overview table / numbered Task sections with Description, Acceptance Criteria, Out of Scope, References
